note: Smoke test results — single query per architecture. Not RAGAS evaluated. Latency includes Ollama cold start.

architectures.name: naive
architectures.notes: Cold start baseline. Citation from FY2024 10-K 3-year comparative table — expected behavior.

architectures.name: hybrid_rag
architectures.notes: Citations differ from naive. Reranker active. Semantic chunking + synonym expansion working.

architectures.name: fusion_rag
architectures.notes: 5 distinct query variants generated. Higher latency expected — 5x retrieval calls.

architectures.name: corrective_rag
architectures.notes: 20 chunks scored. 2 scored >=0.8, rest near 0. Highest latency — CRAG scoring adds overhead.

architectures.name: graph_rag
architectures.notes: Graph results: 5. Cypher executing correctly. Azure not broken out as separate line item in MSFT filings — model correctly said cannot find explicit figure. Expected behavior, not a bug.

architectures.name: agentic_rag
architectures.notes: All 4 tools routing correctly. Re-retrieval triggered once on comparative query (faithfulness_proxy 0.60 -> 1.00 after retry). State transitions logged.

architectures.name: full_system
architectures.notes: All 6 routing decisions correct: simple_factual -> hierarchical, numerical -> agentic, temporal -> agentic, comparative -> fusion, multi_hop -> graph, risk_qualitative -> corrective.

architectures.name: hierarchical_rag
architectures.notes: Waiting for build_summary_index.py to complete. 100 documents, ~50 mins on Ollama llama3.1:8b.
